name: Cistanche
summary: It should be framed conservatively because traditional-system use is broader than modern clinical depth.
description: It should be framed conservatively because traditional-system use is broader than modern clinical depth.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
interactions: caution with laxatives and glucose-lowering therapies.

sources.title: Anti-ageing active ingredients from herbs and nutraceuticals used in traditional Chinese medicine: pharmacological mechanisms and implications for drug discovery
Cistanche deserticola extract and its active components, echinacoside, ameliorate sarcopenia by activating the IGF-1/PI3K-AKT pathway to modulate ferroptosis

v9.4: Mostly animal/preclinical and influencer hype; keep out of monetization until human evidence exists. | Source citation missing in workbook; queued for PMID/source verification before publication.

claimMap.claim: v9.4: Promising preclinical/traditional profile but not enough direct human outcome evidence for monetized recommendation. | Source citation missing in workbook; queued for PMID/source verification before publication.
claimMap.notes: v9.4: Promising preclinical/traditional profile but not enough direct human outcome evidence for monetized recommendation. | Source citation missing in workbook; queued for PMID/source verification before publication.

qualifiers.dose_or_duration: Product-specific extract dosing varies; direct human outcome dose support is limited
